scripts.test:admin-nav-contract: node --test tests/phase633/*.test.js tests/phase635/*.test.js tests/phase636/*.test.js tests/phase637/*.test.js tests/phase638/*.test.js tests/phase639/*.test.js tests/phase640/*.test.js tests/phase641/*.test.js tests/phase642/*.test.js tests/phase643/*.test.js tests/phase644/*.test.js tests/phase645/*.test.js tests/phase646/*.test.js tests/phase647/*.test.js tests/phase648/*.test.js tests/phase651/*.test.js tests/phase671/*.test.js tests/phase674/*.test.js tests/phase854/*.test.js
scripts.preflight: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const pkg=require('./package.json'); if(!pkg.scripts||!pkg.scripts.start) throw new Error('missing scripts.start'); if(!fs.existsSync('src/index.js')) throw new Error('missing src/index.js'); console.log('preflight ok');"
scripts.knowledge-graph:v2:full: npm run knowledge-graph:probe-runtime && npm run knowledge-graph:v2:generate && npm run knowledge-graph:v2:check
scripts.knowledge-graph:v3:full: npm run knowledge-graph:probe-runtime && npm run knowledge-graph:v3:generate && npm run knowledge-graph:v3:check
scripts.knowledge-graph:full: npm run docs-artifacts:generate && npm run knowledge-graph:probe-runtime && npm run knowledge-graph:generate && npm run knowledge-graph:check && npm run knowledge-graph:v2:generate && npm run knowledge-graph:v2:check && npm run knowledge-graph:v3:generate && npm run knowledge-graph:v3:check
scripts.catchup:drift-check: npm run audit-core:check && npm run repo-map:check && npm run docs-artifacts:check && npm run cleanup:check && npm run retention-risk:check && npm run structure-risk:check && npm run load-risk:check && npm run missing-index-surface:check && npm run audit:collection-drift:check && npm run audit:retention-parity:check && npm run audit:phase-origin:check && npm run audit:unreachable:check && npm run audit:scenariokey-drift:check && npm run feature-flags:check
scripts.catchup:gate:pr: npm run test:docs && npm run llm:spec-contract:freeze:check && npm run test:admin-nav-contract && npm run catchup:drift-check && npm run firestore-indexes:check -- --contracts-only && npm run llm:quality:gate:strict && npm run llm:quality:must-pass && npm run llm:quality:release-policy:strict && npm run llm:quality:report
scripts.catchup:gate:full: npm run catchup:gate:pr && npm test && npm run test:trace-smoke && npm run test:ops-smoke
scripts.llm:quality:report: node tools/llm_quality/build_quality_report.js --baseline tmp/llm_quality_baseline_scorecard.json --candidate tmp/llm_quality_candidate_scorecard.json --summary tmp/llm_usage_summary.json --output tmp/llm_quality_report.json && npm run llm:quality:register-failures && npm run llm:quality:counterexample-queue
scripts.llm:quality:audit: npm run llm:quality:baseline && npm run llm:quality:candidate && npm run llm:quality:gate && npm run llm:quality:report && node tools/run_llm_quality_audit.js --summary tmp/llm_usage_summary.json --report tmp/llm_quality_report.json --gate tmp/llm_quality_gate_result.json --output tmp/llm_quality_audit.json
scripts.llm:quality:integration-audit: npm run llm:quality:runtime-summary:prepare && node tools/run_llm_integration_audit.js --summary tmp/llm_usage_summary.json --output tmp/llm_integration_audit.json
scripts.llm:quality:improvement-plan: npm run llm:quality:audit && npm run llm:quality:integration-audit && node tools/generate_llm_improvement_plan.js --audit tmp/llm_quality_audit.json --integration tmp/llm_integration_audit.json --output tmp/llm_quality_improvement_plan.json
scripts.llm:quality:release-policy: LLM_QUALITY_REQUIRE_ALL_SLICES_PASS=true node tools/llm_quality/enforce_release_policy.js --baseline tmp/llm_quality_baseline_scorecard.json --candidate tmp/llm_quality_candidate_scorecard.json --mustPass tmp/llm_quality_must_pass_result.json --summary tmp/llm_usage_summary.json --output tmp/llm_quality_release_policy_result.json
scripts.llm:quality:gate: npm run llm:quality:runtime-summary:prepare && LLM_QUALITY_REQUIRE_ALL_SLICES_PASS=true node tools/llm_quality/run_quality_gate.js --baseline tools/llm_quality/fixtures/baseline_metrics.v1.json --candidate tools/llm_quality/fixtures/candidate_metrics.v1.json --adjudication tools/llm_quality/fixtures/human_adjudication_set.v1.json --manifest benchmarks/registry/manifest.v1.json --output tmp/llm_quality_gate_result.json
scripts.llm:quality:gate:strict: npm run llm:quality:runtime-summary:prepare:strict && LLM_QUALITY_REQUIRE_ALL_SLICES_PASS=true LLM_QUALITY_REQUIRE_RUNTIME_SUMMARY=true LLM_QUALITY_REQUIRE_RUNTIME_PROVENANCE=true LLM_QUALITY_REQUIRE_COMPAT_GOVERNANCE=true LLM_QUALITY_REQUIRE_NOGO_GATE_MANDATORY=true LLM_QUALITY_MAX_COMPAT_SHARE=0.15 node tools/llm_quality/run_quality_gate.js --baseline tools/llm_quality/fixtures/baseline_metrics.v1.json --candidate tools/llm_quality/fixtures/candidate_metrics.v1.json --adjudication tools/llm_quality/fixtures/human_adjudication_set.v1.json --manifest benchmarks/registry/manifest.v1.json --output tmp/llm_quality_gate_result.json
scripts.llm:quality:release-policy:strict: LLM_QUALITY_REQUIRE_ALL_SLICES_PASS=true LLM_QUALITY_REQUIRE_STRICT_RUNTIME_SIGNALS=true LLM_QUALITY_REQUIRE_SOFT_FLOOR_080=true LLM_QUALITY_REQUIRE_COMPAT_GOVERNANCE=true LLM_QUALITY_REQUIRE_NOGO_GATE_MANDATORY=true LLM_QUALITY_MAX_COMPAT_SHARE=0.15 node tools/llm_quality/enforce_release_policy.js --baseline tmp/llm_quality_baseline_scorecard.json --candidate tmp/llm_quality_candidate_scorecard.json --mustPass tmp/llm_quality_must_pass_result.json --summary tmp/llm_usage_summary.json --output tmp/llm_quality_release_policy_result.json
